User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Disallow admin and private pages
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /account/
Disallow: /my-*
Disallow: /notification
Disallow: /createpath
Disallow: /deck
Disallow: /ai-path-detail
Disallow: /stack
Disallow: /card-ui

# Allow search engines to crawl public content
Allow: /home
Allow: /resources
Allow: /resources-trend
Allow: /learningpool
Allow: /learningpool/category/
Allow: /ai-path
Allow: /tools
Allow: /plan
Allow: /about

Sitemap: https://www.learnpathly.com/sitemap.xml
